zh.of Benenden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登
zh.Rolvenden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特洛爾文登
zh.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon是Gervase Gibbon和Mrs. Gervase Gibbon的兒子，於大約1536年出生在英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登。他於大約1560年與Mary在英國肯特貝嫩登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國肯特貝嫩登。

zh-hans.Rolvenden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特洛爾文登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon是Gervase Gibbon和Mrs. Gervase Gibbon的儿子，于大约1536年出生在英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登。他于大约1560年与Mary在英国肯特貝嫩登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国肯特貝嫩登。

nameMeanings.name: Gibbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Giboin (ancient Germanic Gebawin).
English: alternatively, a diminutive of the personal name   Gibb  .
Scottish and Irish: variant of   McGibbon  .

variants.name: Gibb
meanings: English: from the personal name Gibb, a pet form of Gilbert (compare Gibbs ). This surname is also frequent in Scotland.

variants.name: Gibbons
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Gibbon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Mayo): in Ireland, the name is frequent and has been Gaelicized as Mac Giobúin. It is also found as a variant of Fitzgibbon .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon was born about 1536, in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom as the son of Gervase Gibbon and Mrs. Gervase Gibbon. He married Mary about 1560, in Benenden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. He was buried in Benenden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon est né environ 1536, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Gervase Gibbon et Mrs. Gervase Gibbon. Il a épousé Mary environ 1560, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Ilenterré à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon wurde um 1536 in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Gervase Gibbon und Mrs. Gervase Gibbon geboren. Er hat um 1560 in Benenden, Kent, England Mary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er wurde in Benenden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon è nato il circa 1536 nel Benenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Gervase Gibbon e Mrs. Gervase Gibbon. Lui sposato Mary circa 1560, nel Benenden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Fu sepolto a Benenden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbonは約1536年にイギリスイギリスケントベンエンデンでGervase GibbonとMrs. Gervase Gibbonの息子として生まれた。約1560年にイギリスケントベンエンデンでMaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスケントベンエンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon(은)는 대략 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베니든에서 Gervase Gibbon(와)과 Mrs. Gervase Gibbon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1560년 영국 켄트 베니든에서 Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 켄트 베니든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon nasceu aproximadamente 1536, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Gervase Gibbon e Mrs. Gervase Gibbon. Ele casou-se com Mary aproximadamente 1560, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon родился около 1536 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Gervase Gibbon и Mrs. Gervase Gibbon. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary около 1560 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Он был похоронен в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Henry Gibbon nació aproximadamente 1536, en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Gervase Gibbon y Mrs. Gervase Gibbon. Se casó con Mary aproximadamente 1560, en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Fue sepultado en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra.
